LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALAN DONES, JOHN GUILLORY, STRATEGIC URBAN DEVELOPMENT ALLIANCE LLC'S MOTION TO GRANT PETITION TO ENJOIN ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 29, 2019, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, ON THE COURT'S MOTION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALAN DONES, JOHN GUILLORY, STRATEGIC URBAN DEVELOPMENT ALLIANCE LLC' MOTION TO GRANT PETITION TO ENJOIN ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANTS AND THE MOTION TO GRANT PETITION TO ENJOIN ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS IS DENIED. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600 EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS ALAN DONES, JOHN GUILLORY, AND STRATEGY URBAN DEVELOPMENT ALLIANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE OR, ALTERNATIVELY, TAX RESPONDENTS' COST MEMORANDUM IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $86.40, AND IS OTHERWISE DENIED ON THE GROUND THAT RESPONDENTS WERE THE PREVAILING PARTIES ON PETITIONERS' MOTION TO ENJOIN ARBITRATION. RESPONDENTS SHALL RECOVER THEIR COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $480.00. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. DECLARATION OF JOSEPH C. MCGOWAN IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES RELATED TO PETITIONERS PETITION PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 1281.2 (TRANSACTION ID # 100072908) FILED BY RESPONDENT GRIGSBY, CALVIN FISCAL FUNDING CO., INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENTS FISCAL FUNDING COMPANY, INC. AND CALVIN GRISBY'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES RELATED TO PETITIONERS ALAN DONES AND JOHN GUILLORY'S PETITION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2 IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $43,852.00. RESPONDENTS SEEK ATTORNEYS' FEES FOR SUCCESSFULLY DEFENDING PETITIONERS' MOTION TO ENJOIN AN ONGOING ARBITRATION BETWEEN PETITIONERS AND RESPONDENT FISCAL FUNDING COMPANY, INC. ON FEBRUARY 6, 2019, PETITIONERS INITIATED A SEPARATE ACTION BY FILING A PETITION TO ENJOIN ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS, AND THEREAFTER FILED A MOTION TO GRANT PETITION TO ENJOIN ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. THE COURT DENIED THAT MOTION BY ORDER FILED MARCH 29, 2019, FINDING THAT CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2 DOES NOT AUTHORIZE COURT INTERVENTION TO ENJOIN AN ONGOING ARBITRATION. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED.(AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
CLERK'S NOTICE OF FILING OF NOTICE OF APPEAL
NOTICE TO REPORTER TO PREPARE TRANSCRIPT
REMITTITUR DISMISSED A158212 DIV 5

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or, Alternatively, Tax Respondents Costs Memorandum
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Moore, Esq. and Alex Doherty, Esq. 415-273-7464 of Allen Matkins for Petitioner.
Joseph McGowan, Jr. Esq., 415-956-2828 of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell, Esq. for Defendant CALVIN GRIGSBY, FISCAL FUNDING CO., INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court asks questions. Petitioner argues.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER ALAN DONES, JOHN GUILLORY, STRATEGIC URBAN DEVELOPMENT ALLIANCE LLC's Motion To Strike Or, Alternatively, Tax Respondents Costs Memorandum.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.Petitioners Alan Dones, John Guillory, and Strategy Urban Development Alliance, LLC's motion to strike or, alternatively, tax Respondents' cost memorandum is granted in the amount of $86.40, and is otherwise denied on the ground that Respondents were the prevailing parties on Petitioners' motion to enjoin arbitration. Respondents shall recover their costs in the amount of $480.00.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Respondents Calvin Grigsby And Fiscal Funding Co., Inc.'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees After Denial Of Petitioners' Petition Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1281.2 (Part 2 Of 2 For Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Off Calendar

Respondents Motion For Attorneys' Fees After Denial Of Petitioners' Petition Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1281.2
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Moore, Esq. and Alex Doherty, Esq. 415-273-7464 of Allen Matkins for Petitioner.
Joseph McGowan, Jr. Esq., 415-956-2828 of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell, Esq. for Defendant CALVIN GRIGSBY, FISCAL FUNDING CO., INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court asks questions. Petitioner argues.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT CALVIN GRIGSBY, FISCAL FUNDING CO., INC's Motion For Attorneys' Fees After Denial Of Petitioners' Petition Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1281.2.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.Respondents Fiscal Funding Company, Inc. and Calvin Grisby's motion for attorneys' fees related to Petitioners Alan Dones and John Guillory's petition pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.2 is granted in the amount of $43,852.00. Respondents seek attorneys' fees for successfully defending Petitioners' motion to enjoin an ongoing arbitration between Petitioners and Respondent Fiscal Funding Company, Inc. On February 6, 2019, Petitioners initiated a separate action by filing a petition to enjoin arbitration proceedings, and thereafter filed a motion to grant petition to enjoin arbitration proceedings. The Court denied that motion by order filed March 29, 2019, finding that Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.2 does not authorize court intervention to enjoin an ongoing arbitration. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Grant Petition To Enjoin Arbitration Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Grayson W.(Trey) Marshall III, Esq., Allen Matkins, 415-837-1515, appearing for Petitioner Alen Dones, et al;
Joseph C. Mcgowan, Jr., Rogers Joseph O'Donnell, 415-956-2828, appearing for Respondent Fiscal Funding;

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER ALAN DONES, JOHN GUILLORY, STRATEGIC URBAN DEVELOPMENT ALLIANCE LLC' Motion To Grant Petition To Enjoin Arbitration Proceedings.

The Court rules in favor of the defendants and the Motion To Grant Petition To Enjoin Arbitration Proceedings is denied.

The Court will prepare and order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
